# GradeByAI
> GradeByAI scores your website's AI-friendliness (AEO/GEO readiness) and gives you an actionable plan to be cited and discovered by AI systems like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.

## What it does
- Analyzes crawlability (robots.txt, sitemap, JS rendering): 30 points
- Evaluates content structure (headings, semantic HTML, schema.org): 35 points
- Audits technical SEO (meta tags, canonical URLs, structured data): 25 points
- Measures content quality (readability, depth, topical coverage): 10 points

## Use cases
- SEO professionals checking AI discoverability
- Businesses wanting to appear in AI-generated answers
- Developers auditing sites for LLM crawlability

## Pricing
Free to use. Premium AEO consultation available.

## Links
- Homepage: https://gradebyai.com
- How it works: https://gradebyai.com/#how-it-works
- Contact: privacy@gradebyai.com
